---
title: 'Ethiopia: MAM Season Outlook <img src="https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1fHQUzF3ZjaoHj9KQ33-94dK_X1hcmjzW" style="height:50px;float:right;" />' 
output:
  html_document:
    css: style.css
    includes:
      in_header: header.html
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}

# Setting up the dependencies...
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
source("../R/setup.R")
source("../R/load_data.R")
source("../R/process_data.R")
source("../R/plot_data.R")
source("../R/blob_connect.R")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE) # do not print code by default
knitr::opts_chunk$set(include = FALSE) # do not print output by default
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

gghdx()
```


``` {r constants}

# Setting up the constants...
ISO3 <- "ETH" # This isn't totally customizable...
ADM_LEVEL <- 2 # And neither is this one...
SEVERITY <- "tercile" # quartile or tercile 
YEAR <- 2024 # also need to change some plot titles
months_to_include <- c(10, 11, 12) # OND season...
issued_month <- 11 # Select the month we want to get the forecasts issued from
lead_times <- (months_to_include + 12 * (months_to_include < issued_month)) - issued_month

Sys.setenv(AZURE_STORAGE_SAS_TOKEN=Sys.getenv("DSCI_AZ_SAS_PROD"))
Sys.setenv(AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT="imb0chd0prod")

# Data specific to ETH
gdf_pin <- get_eth_gdf_pin() # This contains all adms in ETH

# Now we're just looking at data for the selected zones in season
sel_zones <- subset_adm2_ond_mam()

```

```{r loading}

df_seas5 <- get_historical_rainfall("seas5", ISO3, ADM_LEVEL, sel_zones)
df_era5 <- get_historical_rainfall("era5", ISO3, ADM_LEVEL, sel_zones)
df_seas5_processed <- process_seas5_rainfall(df_seas5, sel_month=issued_month)
df_era5_processed <- process_era5_rainfall(df_era5)

df_summary_seas5 <- join_pin_rainfall(gdf_pin, df_seas5_processed)
df_summary <- join_pin_rainfall(gdf_pin, df_era5_processed)

df_summary_year <- df_summary %>%
  filter(year == YEAR)
```

``` {r}
#df_export <- df_summary_year |>
#  select(pcode, admin2Name_en, year, total_rainfall, return_period)
#write.csv(df_export, "2024_ond_summary.csv")
```

``` {r summarize}

# TODO: Also the `total_unique_pcodes` value here doesn't seem correct...
df_annual_pin <- calc_yearly_impact(df_summary, SEVERITY) %>%
  mutate(
    rank = rank(-total_affected, ties.method = "average"),
    exceedance_prob = rank / (n() + 1),
    return_period = 1 / exceedance_prob
  )

df_sel <- df_annual_pin %>%
  filter(year == YEAR)

total_affected <- df_sel$total_affected
total_rp <- df_sel$return_period

```

``` {r load_cog_stack}

containers <- cumulus::blob_containers(stage="prod")

cog_df <- list_blobs(
  container = containers$raster,
  dir = "era5/monthly/processed"
) %>%
  mutate(
    year = str_extract(name, "v(\\d{4})") %>% str_remove("v") %>% as.integer(), # 'v' for ERA5
    month = str_extract(name, "-(\\d{2})-") %>% str_remove_all("-") %>% as.integer(),
    lt = str_extract(name, "lt\\d+") %>% str_remove("lt") %>% as.integer()
  ) %>%
  filter(
    #month == issued_month,  # for SEAS5
    #lt %in% lead_times  # for SEAS5
    month %in% months_to_include # for ERA5
  )

# Load by year, take the sum, then stack
yearly_sums <- list()
for(sel_year in unique(cog_df$year)) {
  yearly_cogs <- filter(cog_df, year==sel_year)
  urls <- paste0("/vsiaz/raster/", yearly_cogs$name)
  cogs <- rast(urls)
  cogs_clipped <- crop(cogs, gdf_pin)
  cogs_masked <- mask(cogs_clipped, gdf_pin)
  yearly_sum <- sum((cogs_masked * 30))
  if(sel_year == 2024) {
    current_yearly_sum <- yearly_sum
  }
  yearly_sums <- append(yearly_sums, yearly_sum)
}

season_avg <- mean(yearly_sums)

```

``` {r plot_anomalies, include = TRUE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

gdf_sel <- gdf_pin %>% filter(admin2Pcode %in% sel_zones)

# First, calculate global min and max for avg and current plots
all_values <- c(values(season_avg), values(current_yearly_sum))
global_min <- min(all_values, na.rm = TRUE)
global_max <- max(all_values, na.rm = TRUE)

# Mask rasters with gdf_sel
season_avg_masked <- mask(season_avg, gdf_sel)
current_yearly_sum_masked <- mask(current_yearly_sum, gdf_sel)
anomaly_masked <- mask(current_yearly_sum - season_avg, gdf_sel)

# Calculate max absolute anomaly for symmetric scale
max_abs_anomaly <- max(abs(values(anomaly_masked)), na.rm = TRUE)

avg_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = season_avg_masked, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_sf(data = gdf_sel, fill = NA, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient_hdx_sapphire(
    name = "Rainfall\n(mm)",
    limits = c(global_min, global_max)
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(title="Average historical")

current_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = current_yearly_sum_masked, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_sf(data = gdf_sel, fill = NA, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient_hdx_sapphire(
    name = "Rainfall\n(mm)",
    limits = c(global_min, global_max)
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(title="Upcoming season")

anomaly_plot <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = anomaly_masked, na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_sf(data = gdf_sel, fill = NA, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "red",
    mid = "white",
    high = "blue",
    midpoint = 0,
    limits = c(-max_abs_anomaly, max_abs_anomaly),
    na.value = NA,
    name = "Rainfall\nAnomaly (mm)"
  ) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.text.x = element_blank()
  ) + 
  labs(title="Anomalies")

combined_plot <- wrap_plots(list(avg_plot, anomaly_plot), nrow = 1) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = 'Anomalies in total seasonal rainfall',
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14))
  )

combined_plot

```


`r format(round(total_affected), big.mark=",")` people in need are forecasted to experience lower `r SEVERITY` rainfall throughout the upcoming season.

We see this level of people in need once every `r round(total_rp, 1)` years.


``` {r rp_plot, include = TRUE, fig.height=5}

affected_zones <- str_split(df_sel$affected_zones, ", ")[[1]]

# Join again with all adms in ETH
gdf_rp <- gdf_pin %>%
  left_join(df_summary_year, by=c("admin2Pcode"="pcode"))

gdf_lower_quantile <- gdf_pin %>%
  filter(admin2Pcode %in% affected_zones)

plot_rp <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data=gdf_rp, aes(fill = return_period)) +
  geom_sf(data=gdf_lower_quantile, aes(color="Lower tercile rainfall"), fill=NA,linewidth=1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL,  # No title for boundary legend
    values = c("Lower tercile rainfall" = "tomato")  # Color for the boundary lines
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradient_hdx_tomato(na.value = "lightgrey", name="Return Period (years)")+
  labs(
    title = paste("Rainfall Return Periods in", YEAR),
    caption = "Higher return periods indicate rarer low-rainfall events"
  )

plot_rp
```


``` {r calc_yearly_avg}
df_rainfall_annual <- df_summary %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_rainfall = sum(total_rainfall, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(total_rainfall) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year))

df_pin_annual <- df_summary %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_pin = sum(!!sym(glue("TotalPin_{SEVERITY}")), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(total_pin) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year))
```


``` {r, include = TRUE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

df_annual_summary <- df_pin_annual %>%
  full_join(df_rainfall_annual, by="year") %>%
  mutate(point_color = case_when(
    year==YEAR~hdx_hex("tomato-hdx"), 
    year %in% c(2023, 2020, 2012, 2008)~hdx_hex("sapphire-light"),
    TRUE~hdx_hex("sapphire-hdx"))) %>%
  filter(year > 2000) # filtering to more recent years -- greater than 2000

precip_mean <- mean(df_annual_summary$total_rainfall)
affected_mean <- mean(df_annual_summary$total_pin)

x_range <- range(df_annual_summary$total_rainfall)
y_range <- range(df_annual_summary$total_pin)

ggplot(df_annual_summary, aes(x = total_rainfall, y = total_pin)) +
  #geom_vline(xintercept = mean_rainfall, linetype = "dashed", color = "tomato") +
  geom_point(aes(color = point_color)) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = df_annual_summary %>% filter(year %in% c(2025, 2024, 2023, 2020, 2012, 2008)),
    aes(label = year, color = point_color),
    box.padding = 0.3,    # Increases space between text and point
    point.padding = 0.2,  # Increases minimum space between text and point
    #segment.color = "grey50",  # Color of connecting lines
    min.segment.length = 0,    # Always draw line segments
    force = 2,                # Increase force of repulsion
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")) +
  scale_color_identity() +
  labs(
    title = "Annual OND total rainfall vs est. PiN impacted by drought",
    x = "Total Rainfall (mm)",
    y = "Est. PiN Impacted by Drought",
    subtitle = "From 2000 to 2024"
  )

```

``` {r ARCHIVE_density_plot}
recent_years <- filter(df_rainfall_annual, year %in% c(2025, 2020, 2024, 2023, 2008))
mean_rainfall <- mean(df_rainfall_annual$total_rainfall, na.rm = TRUE)

density_plot <- ggplot(data=df_rainfall_annual, aes(x=total_rainfall)) +
  # Density plot
  geom_density(fill="steelblue", alpha=0.5 ) +
  # Mean rainfall
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean_rainfall, color = "black") +
  geom_text(aes(
    x = mean_rainfall,
    y = max(density(df_rainfall_annual$total_rainfall)$y)),
    label = "Mean",
    angle = 90,
    size=3.5,
    vjust = -0.5,
    hjust = 1.5,
    color = "black") + 
  # Highlighted years 
  geom_vline(xintercept = recent_years$total_rainfall, 
             linetype="dashed",
             color=ifelse(recent_years$year == 2025, "red", "black")) + 
  geom_text(data = recent_years,
            aes(x = total_rainfall, 
                y = max(density(df_rainfall_annual$total_rainfall)$y),
                label = year),
            vjust = -0.5,
            hjust = 5,
            angle=90,
            size = 3.5,
            color=ifelse(recent_years$year == 2025, "red", "black")) +
  # Additional styling
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
  labs(x="Total seasonal rainfall (mm)", y="Density of occurrence", title="Distribution of annual total seasonal rainfall")
```


ALL CODE BELOW IS ARCHIVED.

``` {r ARCHIVE_plot_forecast}
gdf_sel <- gdf_pin %>% filter(admin2Pcode %in% sel_zones)

raster_list <- list()
for(lt in lead_times) {
  blob_path <- sprintf("seas5/monthly/processed/precip_em_i2024-11-01_lt%d.tif", lt)
  cog_url <- file.path(base_url, container, blob_path)
  cog_url <- paste0(cog_url, "?", sas_token)
  try({
    r <- rast(cog_url)
    raster_list[[length(raster_list) + 1]] <- r
  }, silent = TRUE)
}

cog_stack <- rast(raster_list)
clipped_stack <- crop(cog_stack, gdf_pin)
masked_stack <- mask(clipped_stack, gdf_pin)

global_min <- min(values(masked_stack), na.rm=TRUE)
global_max <- max(values(masked_stack), na.rm=TRUE)

plots <- list()
months <- c("March", "April", "May")
for(i in 1:nlyr(masked_stack)) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = masked_stack[[i]], na.rm = TRUE) +
    geom_sf(data = gdf_sel, fill = NA, color = "darkgrey", linewidth = 0.3) +
    scale_fill_gradient_hdx_sapphire(
      na.value = NA, 
      name="Rainfall\n(mm)",
      limits = c(global_min, global_max),
    )+
    ggtitle(months[i]) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust=0.5),
          axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_blank()
          
    )
  
  # Remove legend from all but the last plot
  if(i != nlyr(masked_stack)) {
    p <- p + theme(legend.position = "none")
  }
  plots[[i]] <- p
}


```

``` {r ARCHIVE_create_plot_forecast, include = TRUE, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}
combined_plot <- wrap_plots(plots, nrow = 1) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = 'Forecasted Average Daily Rainfall',
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 16))
  )
combined_plot

```

``` {r ARCHIVE_annual_rainfall}
df_rainfall_annual <- df_summary %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_rainfall = sum(total_rainfall, na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(total_rainfall) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year))

ggplot(df_rainfall_annual, aes(x = reorder(year, total_rainfall), 
               y = total_rainfall,
               fill = year == YEAR)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("steelblue", "tomato")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)),  # Add 30% padding at top
    #labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Rainfall (mm)", title="Ranked annual total MAM rainfall") +
  geom_text(aes(label = year), 
          angle = 90,
          hjust = -0.2,  # Pushes labels above bars
          size = 3)  +  # Adjust text size as needed
    theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),  # Remove year labels from axis
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank() ) # Remove axis ticks


```

``` {r ARCHIVE_annual_PIN}

df_pin_annual <- df_summary %>% 
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_pin = sum(!!sym(glue("TotalPin_{SEVERITY}")), na.rm=TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  arrange(total_pin) %>%
  mutate(year = as.numeric(year))

ggplot(df_pin_annual, aes(x = reorder(year, -total_pin), 
               y = total_pin,
               fill = year == YEAR)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("lightgray", "tomato")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)),  # Add 50% padding at top
    labels = scales::label_number(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "Total PiN", title="Ranked annual total MAM PiN", caption=glue("'Total PiN' is calculated as the sum of all PiN in zones experiencing lower {SEVERITY} seasonal rainfall")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = year), 
          angle = 90,
          hjust = -0.2,  # Pushes labels above bars
          size = 3)  +  # Adjust text size as needed
    theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),  # Remove year labels from axis
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank() ) # Remove axis ticks
  
```
